project.name: Apex
project.problem: GraphQL APIs are slow, brittle, and painful to deploy at scale.

scenes.headline: v2 by the numbers
scenes.caption: Benchmarked on Cloudflare Workers with 50 concurrent clients.
One export. Runs on Workers, Deno Deploy, Bun, and Node.

before.label: v1 — 12 lines to start

after.label: v2 — one file, any runtime

scenes.caption: Drop the boilerplate. Keep the control.

scenes.headline: What shipped in v2

items.text: Native WebSocket subscriptions on any runtime
Edge-native: Workers, Deno Deploy, Bun, Node
Built-in query depth limiting and cost analysis
Full TypeScript inference — no codegen needed

scenes.caption: Everything GraphQL should have been from day one.
Responses served from cache. Database only when needed.

commands.output:
✓ Updated 4 resolver files
✓ 0 breaking changes detected
✓ Context types regenerated

scenes.caption: Migrate from v1 in under a minute.
